Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests.datatype

Class TestConstructor

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.AbstractTests
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.datatype.TestConstructor
public class TestConstructor extends AbstractTests
Unit tests of interfaces IConstructorExtension and IConstructorArgument.
